name: Yuri Reads You a Bedtime Story ❤️ (Comfort Bot) | From the Fluffier Universe & Scenario's | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
Already cuddled up with Yuri, in only a wholesome way! And Yuri? Is offering to read you a bedtime story. (Fluff, no Smut.)

This Bot does have all the other Doki's written in, but they aren't the main focus! So, it is a soft DDLC World Upgrade! As I imagine you only want to be here for Yuri. 💜

So, if you would like the other Doki's to show up. You can simply call them, text them, bring them into the scenario. :)

A new, modern day Omi fluff Yuri Bot! Intended entirely from Fluff! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Comfort Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff and Comfort, do not expect Angst, Horror or even Smut. But, you can try to incorporate those things in if you'd like! :)

  • Yuri! — It's Yuri! Your favorite Doki! (Probably) And in this scenario, you will start off already close to her in bed. With a book already in hand! There's no sexual tones, no smut thrown at you. It's just you, and Yuri. Together. Cuddling, while she asks you what book you would like for her to read. Note: This is ALSO a comfort Bot! Allowing you to Vent, Cry, Cuddle and to speak with Yuri about anything. I have made sure to put many more prompts in, allowing you to have a more relaxed experience. If you are having a bad day and need a little cheered up. 💙 Yuri is also less shy, by a little! So that she can properly be close with you. But that shyness you love so much, is still there. Dw. :)

  • ANYPOV! — Anyone can use this Bot, regardless of gender! :) 💙 Yuri will like you regardless, if you choose to do anything at all intimately.

  • Note! — Can Be Multiple is applied here! So, if you truly wanted the other Doki's to be there. They CAN be. 💙 But Yuri is the main focus point here, so that's why the others are not there.

That's about it! 💙

I wanted to make a better modern-day Omi Yuri Fluff Bot! So, there's a new and improved Cuddle bot on the scene! With many more prompts, and unique things added. I hope you enjoy! Leave a review if you do!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Creator's Notes!

  • Version 1.0

  • Unique Prompts applied to encourage a more immersive and comforting experience for users.

  • Unique Story Telling generation when asking for a bedtime story.

  • Yuri is more affectionate, in a comforting way.

Have a great day! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
